name: Rosewood Sand Hill
address: 2825 Sand Hill Road, Menlo Park, CA 94025

sense_of_place.narrative: Rosewood Sand Hill sits at the literal crossroads of the modern technological era. To the south, Sand Hill Road — a single mile of road that has financed the inventions of the last fifty years. To the north, Stanford University, whose intellectual gravity bends the valley. To the west, the wooded hills of Windy Hill, Russian Ridge, and the redwoods of the San Mateo coast. To the east, the southern reaches of San Francisco Bay. The property is not a hotel placed near these landmarks — it is the place where their cultures intersect. Founders write business plans on the patio at sunset. Stanford faculty hold sabbaticals in the gardens. Wine country drivers stop here before crossing the hills to Saratoga and Woodside. The sense of place is intellectual rigor expressed in California ease: cedar and stone, cypress and olive, a stillness that respects the noise its guests are escaping.
anchors: Sand Hill Road as a single mile of venture capital history
Stanford intellectual heritage and the campus a mile away
The patio at sunset — the property's most legendary moment
Windy Hill and Russian Ridge hiking trails as the wild boundary
Olive groves and the slow rhythm of California agriculture
Wine country across the Santa Cruz Mountains (Saratoga, Woodside)
Madera — the property's restaurant, where Silicon Valley deals are closed

local_partners.name: Stanford Sierra Olive Oil Grove
local_partners.purpose: Welcome amenity — single-grove olive oil flight, three varietals.
local_partners.narrative: A 30-acre olive grove tended by Stanford's land trust, pressed locally. Olive oil arrives at the room in three small flasks with a tasting card.

local_partners.name: Madera Restaurant
local_partners.narrative: Open hearth, locally-sourced Northern California ingredients. Chef Jeremy Conklin's tasting menu is a regional autobiography.

local_partners.name: Sequoia Spa
local_partners.narrative: Named for the trees that flank the property. The signature treatment uses oils pressed from the Stanford grove.

local_partners.name: Filoli Gardens
local_partners.purpose: Recommended weekend experience, 16 minutes by car.
local_partners.narrative: A 1917 Georgian Revival country house with formal gardens. Best at golden hour. Available for private after-hours visits via the property's concierge.

local_partners.name: Thomas Fogarty Winery
local_partners.purpose: Hill-top winery in Saratoga, 35 minutes by car.
local_partners.narrative: Vineyards perched at 2000 feet, views of the entire bay. Pinot Noir and Chardonnay focus. Private tastings can be arranged for property guests with sommelier accompaniment.

local_partners.name: Hidden Villa
local_partners.purpose: Working farm and wilderness preserve in Los Altos, 18 minutes by car.
local_partners.narrative: An 1,600-acre farm and trail network. Family-friendly. Private guided hike with on-site naturalist arranged via concierge.

local_partners.name: Stanford University Campus
local_partners.purpose: Walking and bike tours, 8 minutes by car.
local_partners.narrative: Pre-arranged private tour with a Stanford student docent. The Cantor Arts Center, the Rodin Sculpture Garden, and the Memorial Church are highlights.

local_partners.name: Allied Arts Guild
local_partners.purpose: Spanish Colonial gardens and artisan studios, 6 minutes by car.
local_partners.narrative: Working artisan studios in 1929 Spanish Colonial buildings. Lunch at the Blue Garden is the local secret.

experiences.name: Founder's Hour at Madera
experiences.summary: Chef's table tasting in Madera with sommelier pairings. Ideal for closing or celebrating an investment.

experiences.name: Sunrise on Windy Hill
experiences.summary: Guided dawn hike to Windy Hill summit with a Rosewood guide, returning to property for restorative breakfast in the garden.

experiences.name: Sand Hill Road Walk-and-Talk
experiences.summary: Historic VC firm tour by foot along Sand Hill Road, with a hospitality docent narrating the founding of Sequoia, Kleiner Perkins, Andreessen Horowitz.

experiences.name: Filoli at Golden Hour
experiences.summary: Private after-hours garden visit at Filoli with charcuterie and Sonoma wine on the terrace. Best in May–October.

experiences.name: Fogarty Vineyard Tasting (Saratoga)
experiences.summary: Car service to Thomas Fogarty Winery in Saratoga, private tasting with the estate's winemaker, return via Skyline Boulevard.

experiences.name: Stanford Campus Walk
experiences.summary: Walking tour of central Stanford campus with a student docent. Cantor Arts Center and Rodin Sculpture Garden included.

experiences.name: Hidden Villa Family Hike
experiences.summary: Guided family hike at Hidden Villa farm in Los Altos. Kid-friendly trail with farm animal visit. Picnic lunch from Madera.

experiences.name: Stanford Sierra Olive Oil Tasting (in-room welcome)
experiences.summary: Three single-varietal olive oils from the Stanford Sierra grove arranged on a cedar board with a tasting card. Complimentary welcome amenity.

experiences.name: Patio Sur Private Reservation
experiences.summary: The southern patio reserved exclusively, suitable for external meetings or intimate dining. Heaters and a serif menu provided.

experiences.name: Midnight at Madera (after-hours)
experiences.summary: After-hours hearthside dessert and digestif, hosted by the night manager. By invitation, suitable for long stays.

amenities: Car service (Tesla and Mercedes EQS fleet)
Kids amenities and Kids Club (seasonal + on request)

restaurants.name: Madera Bar
restaurants.signature: California craft cocktails, hill-view terrace seating

spa.name: Sequoia Spa
signature_treatments: Stanford Grove Olive Oil Massage (90 min)

operational_metadata.early_check_in_policy: Subject to availability, complimentary for Rosewood Elite Platinum.
operational_metadata.cancellation_policy_default: 48 hours prior to arrival, no charge.
operational_metadata.pet_policy: Welcome in designated rooms. USD 150 cleaning fee.
operational_metadata.minor_check_in_policy: HAP-RULE 4.3 — Human check-in required for any reservation with declared minors. Documentary verification of each minor.
